bio.heading: Who is Ali?
description: I started programming in 2015 and have since grown into a full-stack software engineer with professional experience building scalable applications using React, TypeScript, C#, .NET, and SQL. My work has included modernizing legacy systems, developing microservices, designing ETL-style data pipelines, and building applications that prioritize reliability, maintainability, and performance.

Over the years, I’ve worked across insurance, consulting, analytics, and startup environments, contributing to everything from event-driven AWS workflows to AI-assisted application features. I enjoy solving complex technical problems, building clean user experiences, and thoughtfully integrating Generative AI into workflows where it can improve productivity, automation, content generation, moderation, and developer efficiency without overcomplicating the user experience.
I’ve also worked with technologies such as Next.js, Neo4j, LangChain, and LLM-powered tooling while continuing to focus on practical, maintainable solutions that deliver real business value.

Outside of software engineering, I enjoy going to the gym, spending time at the beach, studying history, reading Islamic books, listening to podcasts, and experimenting with new technologies and developer tools.

experience.title: Backend Software Engineer
experience.description: Executed instruction-driven backend and data-focused tasks with a strong emphasis on accuracy, reliability, and consistency. Monitored and corrected data quality issues proactively before deployment or submission, collaborated with remote stakeholders in an asynchronous workflow, and contributed to maintaining scalable and dependable data operations.

experience.title: Founding Software Engineer
experience.description: A skilled founding full-stack engineer in React and C#, specializing in building efficient, smooth, and scalable applications. Experienced in developing and managing both open-source and client projects using Next.js and Node.js. Proficient in integrating headless CMS platforms like Sanity, Contentful, and Shopify into modern web applications. Skilled in using Figma for creating custom icons and overseeing software architecture to ensure high-quality, maintainable solutions.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
experience.description: I created and managed documentation, set up unit tests for both frontend and backend, handled support requests, and established a CI/CD pipeline using Docker containers in AWS.

experience.title: Full Stack Engineer
experience.description: Developed TypeScript interfaces for props and created demo sites using Next.js in TypeScript. Refactored TypeScript, encapsulated reusable components into an NPM package used across multiple applications, and maintained adherence to SOLID principles and clean code practices. Additionally, conducted training for junior developers in React using TypeScript and documented system details on Confluence.

experience.title: Chief Technology Officer
experience.description: In my role, I strategically planned the Minimum Viable Product (MVP), leading a team of engineers and UX designers, aligning technical goals with business objectives, and leveraging my leadership skills to build a cohesive and motivated team, resulting in the successful and timely delivery of high-quality products within budget.

experience.title: Founding Software Engineer
experience.description: As the Founding Software Engineer, I played a multifaceted role, spearheading the development of compelling designs for the landing page and web application, refactoring code, integrating UI libraries like Material-UI and Chakra-UI, utilizing advanced technologies such as Next.js, ensuring responsive code, and consistently incorporating customer feedback to enhance the product.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Revitalized a client's legacy system with Angular on the client side and Node.js on the server side, employing microservices and gRPC for internal communication. Managed private npm packages for features like exporting spreadsheets and handled database tasks, including converting SQL server stored procedures to MySQL and addressing related issues.
